seoTitle: Hampton vs Hampton East — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hampton and Hampton East. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hampton vs Hampton East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hampton and Hampton East.
heading: Hampton vs Hampton East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hampton, Victoria and Hampton East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hampton has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Hampton East (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hampton or Hampton East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hampton has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Hampton East scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hampton scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Hampton East scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hampton or Hampton East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hampton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
